parity.notes: Counted on the reference solutions (both arms structurally parallel): 1 static class/module + Set (1) + KeyOf (branch, 2) + ValueOf (branch, 2) + Get (exists guard + loop + branch, 4) + CountKeys (exists guard + loop + branch, 4) + Compact (exists guard + first-appearance loop with branch + rebuild loop, 5) = 18 per arm, ratio 1.0. Complexity = 1 per function + 1 per branch/loop. Second-wave hardness pair (last-write-wins, first-'=' split, prefix keys, first-appearance compaction order, must-not-create-file); NOT yet difficulty-validated (gates doc §3.1).

wedgeWhitelistCheck: No contracts in the fixtures or reference solutions (W3 exercises effect boundaries, not the prover). Effect boundaries are manifest-covered: File.AppendAllText (fs:w), File.Exists / File.ReadAllLines (fs:r), File.WriteAllText (fs:w) — all present in the bcl-io manifest; list mutation declares the enforced 'mut' effect. All code is first-order: no delegates, no lambdas, no function values.
retiredReason: hardness-check-001: at ceiling; cannot power the 2a gate
